sources.description: Translated by H.A. Wilson. From Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers, Second Series, Vol. 5, Edited by Philip Schaff and Henry Wace, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1893. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.
